result.reason: Duplicating SSH connections when Jump Mode is active currently fails, which impacts usability and user workflow.
result.approach: Investigate the connection cloning logic in `ConnectionInfo.cs` and `ConnectionInitiator.cs` specifically for SSH tunnel connections (Jump Mode). Identify the root cause of the duplication failure by ensuring all relevant SSH and Jump Mode properties are correctly copied during the duplication process, preventing loss of configuration or incorrect state.
